title: Rhynchodia slootenii
taxonomy: Rhynchodia slootenii is classified within the family Fabaceae, commonly known as the legume family. This classification is based on its botanical characteristics and evolutionary relationships with other plants. Rhynchodia slootenii is further grouped into the subfamily Faboideae, which includes a wide range of legumes. The species is also a member of the tribe Loteae, a group of legumes that are primarily found in the Southern Hemisphere. Its classification helps in understanding its unique features and its place within the plant kingdom.
